reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The smell of mold in the old building, the yellow stains in the bathroom toilet and sink, the broken bathroom slippers, the old towels that smelled and were yellowed were the worst. The parking lot was too narrow... It's a place I would never go again. I booked for two nights, but I just left on the second day. 😭

reviews.title: Close to Gimhae Airport.
reviews.text: Stayed the night before returning home. The location is good as it is within sight of the light rail. I went to Kameura Market via Subway Line 2. There are plenty of restaurants, so you won't have any trouble finding food. The mart is also nearby, making it perfect for forgetting to buy souvenirs. However, there is a large road construction going on in front of the hotel. It seems like it will take quite a long time. Also, the hotel entrance is via stairs, which can be tough with heavy luggage. 💦

reviews.title: I will take a good rest and leave.
reviews.text: I was worried about choosing a hotel for my Busan trip, but I think I made a good choice.

reviews.title: The bathroom odor is very strong~
reviews.text: The accommodation was overall good, but the odor in the bathroom was very strong and quite uncomfortable.

reviews.title: It is a cost-effective accommodation.
reviews.text: I am satisfied with the location and facilities for the price. However, I would like the bed sheets, blankets, and other bedding to be a bit cleaner.

reviews.title: The location is great.
reviews.text: It was a clean and spacious room in front of the station. The only challenging part was the stairs at the hotel entrance.

reviews.title: Location and cost performance are the key factors.
reviews.text:
Located in front of Sahang Station. It has good access to the airport and the bus terminal is right in front. It was the perfect location for exploring the suburbs with Busan as a base. 
The building is old, but the interior facilities have been renovated, and the cleaning is thorough and tidy. 
The room is spacious and has a refrigerator, a bathtub, and a hairdryer. There is also a desk, making the room very comfortable. 
I definitely want to come back.

reviews.title: Clean hotel
reviews.text: It is a 3-minute walk to Sasan Station, and the bus terminal is also nearby. The area around the hotel has a high level of restaurants, and the prices are cheap. It is a very convenient hotel, and I keep coming back.

reviews.title: Busan Sasang Hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel is well located less than 5 mins walk from Sasang Station which is less than 10 mins from Gimhae International Airport.
There is a huge emart around the area great for shopping snacks, food and essentials.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Big room for family plus cheap price!

reviews.title: Good value for money.
reviews.text: Everyone was extremely kind, the cleaning was done thoroughly, and I had a comfortable stay.

reviews.title: 場所は良いが…
reviews.text:
ん～、古い。
韓国ならではの雰囲気を味わうなら良いが、ビジネス利用はオススメ出来ない。
フロントも必要最小限でしかいない。

reviews.title: 場所は良いが…
reviews.text:
ん～古い。
今どきのホテルと比べると広く良いが、ビジネス利用はオススメはしない。
ただ韓国独特の雰囲気を味わうなら良いかも。
フロントも必要最小限でしかいないのでちょいと不便。

reviews.title: 立地
reviews.text: 駅近で何処に行くのも便利。部屋や設備は古いですがスタッフが皆様親切です。最終日は13時まで部屋が利用できて助かりました。

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
ベッドもキングサイズでしたし、ロケーションも最高でした。
スーパーマーケット、飲食店、駅　全て徒歩圏内でした。
また泊まってもよいと思います。

reviews.title: 最高
reviews.text:
駅から近い、部屋も広く浴槽つき。
釜山に行くときはリピートしてます。何の不自由もありません。

reviews.title: 最高
reviews.text: 建物は古いですが立地良し、値段良しで最高です。

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: 침구가 더럽습니다. 여러번 사용한 것으로 보입니다. 대단히 불결합니다. 가격이 싸서 그렇게 관리합니까?

reviews.title: 가성비와 위치 다좋아요.
reviews.text: 직원분같은 사장님일듯한 분이 체크인 해주셨는데 엄청 친절 하시고  생각보다 더 유ㅣ생상탸ㅠ좋고 방도 넓어서 매우 좋았습니다. 주변 조용해서 잠 잘오고ㅡ  지하철 버스 다 있어서 좋았어요

reviews.title: CP 值高，整潔舒適距離沙上站很近的商務飯店
reviews.text: CP值很高的商務飯店，備品及房間的設備都有，插座很多還有USB插槽。浴室超大，床很軟，一切都很滿意。只有隔音不是非常好但地處安靜的地方所以可以接受。
